name: Glenn Inc
text: I was nervous dealing with the insurance company. DVHIVE gave me a plan, delivered the appraisal quickly, and checked in until I closed the claim. Excellent service.

name: Leo Petrolo
text: After my car was repaired, the trade-in value dropped more than i expected. DVHIVE helped me deliver a professional and certified appraisal. The insurance company accepted it right away! I was so surprised because typically they tend to lowball.The process was organized, the report was easy to read, and I felt supported the entire time. If you need a diminished value appraisal, this is the way to go.

name: Joshua Hartley
text: I just want to say thank you so much for putting thousands in my pocket. At first I was hesitant spending money for your service, but it was the best money I’ve ever spent. I really appreciate what you did for me thanks.
